notes:
Ember 1.9.6 — Fixed natural voice connection failures

• Natural voice (the Gemini Live API real-time voice mode) was failing every connection attempt with 'received 1008 (policy violation)' — the native-audio model ID it used had been retired by Google. Updated to the current model, and added a fallback chain so a future model retirement degrades gracefully instead of failing outright.

Builds on 1.9.5's Ember Browser packaging fix and the guard against invented email addresses.
